blockers: All pT spectrum tables in ins1419652 are inclusive with qualifier N(P=3) >= 1; none are conditioned on manuscript multiplicity intervals.
No pT spectrum table in ins1419652 carries an exact manuscript multiplicity-bin qualifier among ['21-30', '31-40', '41-50', '51-60', '61-70', '71-80', '81-90', '91-100', '101-125', '126-150'].
Multiplicity-bin rows appear in multiplicity-distribution tables, but those rows do not provide conditional pT spectra for the same multiplicity bins.
